_spec: BANZA Internal Event Type Registry v1.0
_description: Canonical registry of all event types emitted on the BANZA internal event stream (GET /events). These are protocol-level events — not webhook delivery events. See contracts/webhooks/event-types.json for outbound webhook types.

event_types.description: A wallet was created. Emitted for all wallet types: consumer, merchant, internal, government.
A transfer was completed from a wallet's perspective as the sender. One payment.sent event is emitted per completed transfer.

amount_minor.description: Amount debited in minor units. INV-LEDGER-003: integer, never float.

event_types.notes: Emitted atomically with payment.received. Both events share the same trace_id and correlation_id.

event_types.description: A transfer was completed from a wallet's perspective as the recipient. One payment.received event is emitted per completed transfer.
A payment request (pull payment) was created and is awaiting payment.
A payment request was fulfilled. The resulting transfer ID is included. The payment_request and the resulting transfer share the same trace_id.

transfer_id.description: The transfer that fulfilled this payment request. Its causation_id equals the pr_id.

event_types.notes: causation_id on the resulting transfer MUST equal the payment_request ID.

event_types.description: A QR code was generated. This is the root event for a QR payment flow.
A QR code was paid. The QR code transitions to PAID/USED status. The resulting transfer ID is included.

transfer_id.description: The transfer that settled this QR payment.

event_types.notes: After qr.paid, the QR code MUST NOT accept further payments (INV-QR-001: single-use enforcement).

event_types.description: A settlement batch was initiated. Emitted when the batch transitions to CREATED status.

gross_minor.description: Total gross amount before fees. INV-STL-001: gross = net + fee.

event_types.description: A settlement batch completed successfully. The provider reference for the rail settlement is included.

provider_ref.description: External settlement rail reference. Null in sandbox.

invariants.INV-TRACE-001: Every event MUST carry trace_id and correlation_id. All events in the same payment flow MUST share the same trace_id.
invariants.INV-EVENT-001: Event IDs are globally unique. No id value appears twice in the event stream.
invariants.INV-EVENT-002: created_at is set at emission time. It is immutable after emission.
invariants.INV-LEDGER-003: All amount_minor values in event payloads MUST be integers. Float monetary values are a certification FAIL.
